canonical_definition: ICSI Meeting Recorder Dialog Act corpus, a multiparty dialogue dataset with 50 fine-grained DA classes, used to evaluate dialogue act classification and related pre-tasks.
papers: LogicPro: Improving Complex Logical Reasoning via Program-Guided Learning
